title: Kalayat Ancient Bricks Temple Complex
tagline: Kalayat Ancient Bricks Temple Complex — spiritual town of Haryana

heroImage.alt: Kalayat Ancient Bricks Temple Complex, Haryana

overview.short: The Kalayat Ancient Brick Temple Complex is a ruined brick temple complex north of Delhi, is located in Kalayat town in Kaithal district of the state of Haryana, India.
overview.description: The Kalayat Ancient Brick Temple Complex is a ruined brick temple complex north of Delhi, is located in Kalayat town in Kaithal district of the state of Haryana, India. It comprises the several Hindu temples, including two ancient temples dating from the 8th century. This temple constitutes an important point in the series of 48 kos parikrama of Kurukshetra. Tradition avers that the temples are associated with the Shalivahana (Raja Sálbán).

topPlaces.name: Kalayat
topPlaces.description: Kalayat is a town in Kaithal district in the Indian state of Haryana. It is historical town known as Kapilayat and Kapilayatana in past, named after the Vedic sage Kapila, is home of the 8th century Kalayat Ancient Bricks Temple Complex.

items.note: Kalayat is a town in Kaithal district in the Indian state of Haryana. It is historical town known as Kapilayat and Kapilayatana in past, named after the Vedic sage Kapila, is home of the 8th century Kalayat Ancient Bricks Temple Complex.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kalayat Ancient Bricks Temple Complex?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kalayat Ancient Bricks Temple Complex is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kalayat Ancient Bricks Temple Complex?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chandigarh International Airport (122 km) and the nearest railway station is Ambala Cantt Junction (95 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kalayat Ancient Bricks Temple Complex?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kalayat Ancient Bricks Temple Complex at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kalayat Ancient Bricks Temple Complex?
faq.a: Stays in Kalayat Ancient Bricks Temple Complex start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
